description: You are the Facility Manager for a new E-sports startup leasing a large open-plan building (an empty villa shell) in Sweet Home 3D. Design a high-density gaming layout using the built-in catalog that includes a Competitive Stage (5v5) with 10 desks, 10 gaming chairs, and 10 computers/monitors; a Casual PC Row with at least 15 desks, 15 chairs, and 15 computers/laptops; and a sound-isolated Streaming/Shoutcasting Booth featuring at least 3 partition walls, a door, a window, a desk, a chair, and a computer. The design must also incorporate a Console Lounge & Reception area with at least 2 sofas/armchairs, 2 TVs, and a reception counter with a desk and computer. Define at least 4 distinct room areas (e.g., 'Stage', 'Casual', 'Booth', 'Lounge') using room boundaries and apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least 3 of these rooms. Save the completed design to /home/ga/Documents/gaming_arena.sh3d.
